containerOverrides.name: brand-watchdog
command:
import asyncio
from brand_watchdog.config import load_config
from brand_watchdog.models.database import setup_database, get_engine
from sqlalchemy import text
from pathlib import Path

async def migrate():
    config = load_config(Path('config.yaml') if Path('config.yaml').exists() else None)
    setup_database(config.storage)
    engine = get_engine()
    async with engine.begin() as conn:
        await conn.execute(text("ALTER TABLE target_sites ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS brand VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'sky_plus'"))
    print('Migration completed: brand column added')

asyncio.run(migrate())
